name: code-quality
description: Claude Code plugin for code auditing (security, cost, performance, cleanup), config refinement, memory cleanup, jCodeMunch indexing, and combined quality workflows.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Code audit — security, cost, performance, cleanup. Detects language stack automatically.

commands.name: refine
commands.description: Refine CLAUDE.md, settings.json, hooks — remove duplication, resolve conflicts.

commands.name: index
commands.description: Index the current project with jCodeMunch for symbol-aware navigation.

commands.name: memory-prune
commands.description: Scan ~/.claude/projects/ memory files and clean stale/duplicate entries.

commands.name: code-quality
commands.description: Combined workflow — index + audit + optional refine. Single unified report.
